safe_claims: A persistent transit-like signal is present in six 120-s TESS sectors.
A giant-planet-sized scale is conditional on a planetary event originating on the catalog target and on the catalog single-star and dilution assumptions.
The phase-folded transit fit is a descriptive reference, not an adopted native-cadence posterior.
A converged fit-window sensitivity comparison shows that the descriptive statistical intervals do not include window choice.
Formal sector-depth errors reject a constant-depth model, but the cause is not assigned as astrophysical.
Phase 6R passed numerical stationarity in 24 of 24 branches but failed the frozen residual-correlation gate.
No calibrated population false-positive probability is reported.
The object remains an unvalidated and unconfirmed candidate.
No Zenodo DOI is claimed until a future frozen package is deposited and independently verified.
unsafe_claims: The density mismatch is a calibrated 4.3-sigma discovery.
The eccentricity is measured near 0.28 or 0.31.
The transit source is formally localized to the target.
The candidate is dynamically confirmed or has a measured mass.
Stage 3 has produced a new real-data noise or transit posterior.
material_incomplete_controls: A Stage-3 correlated-noise model passing frozen synthetic, numerical, predictive, residual, and convergence gates.
Converged native-cadence circular transit posterior with all accepted model uncertainties.
Marginalized correlated-noise, baseline, reduction, and residual-dilution parameters.
A principled fit-window model or uncertainty treatment covering the observed sensitivity.
Coherent passband-integrated atmosphere and isochrone posterior with mass-radius covariance.
Secondary-eclipse scan over eccentric orbital phases.
Calibrated TESS PRF source-localization likelihood and contrast curve.
Target-specific epoch radial velocities or equivalent dynamical evidence.
AASTeX conversion and a newly compiled canonical PDF.
Regenerated scientific and mathematical audits against the final source.
Regenerated release manifest after scientific freeze.
Verified public deposit and resolvable DOI for a future release.

blocking_reasons: The final Stage-3 scientific path is not closed.
A passband-integrated atmosphere and isochrone stellar posterior is not complete.
The transit source remains unresolved without calibrated PRF localization and external imaging.
The current mathematical audit and SHA-256 release manifest predate the current TeX and roadmap.

phase_6r_numerical_remediation.model: unchanged Phase-6 V2 K0 white+jitter joint model

stage3_scope_amendment.approval_record: User instructed the project to continue gradually to the next phase.
s3_04b_smoke_test_limitations: The previous Celerite GP draw used a process-global random generator and was not reproducible from the recorded realization seed.
The smoke test evaluated only C01/C02, one branch, one mask, and one held sector rather than the frozen full calibration universe.
The smoke-test CSV must not be used for threshold derivation, model adoption, or real-data authorization.
